tests.name: Booking Flow — English, Cleaning, Name+Phone Only

script.message: Hi, I'd like to book a cleaning appointment for next Tuesday

eval.criteria: Agent responds in English, acknowledges booking request

script.message: I prefer Dr. Sarah Chen if possible

eval.criteria: Agent acknowledges dentist preference and checks availability for the date
Agent asks for patient name
Agent asks for cell phone number, does NOT ask for email, address, or DOB
Agent reads back all booking details and asks for explicit confirmation before booking
Agent confirms booking was made AND mentions SMS confirmation was sent

tests.name: Booking Flow — Chinese, Crown, Name+Phone Only

eval.criteria: Agent responds in Chinese (zh)
Agent acknowledges in Chinese and proceeds with booking flow
Agent checks availability and offers times in Chinese
Agent collects name and asks for phone number in Chinese
Agent confirms booking details and mentions SMS in Chinese

script.message: I need to book a consultation

eval.criteria: Agent proceeds with booking flow in English

script.message: Any dentist is fine, how about Thursday?

eval.criteria: Agent checks availability and offers slots
Agent asks for name
Agent asks for cell phone number

script.message: I don't have a cell phone

eval.criteria: Agent asks for email address as fallback (not before checking for phone first)
Agent confirms booking and mentions email confirmation was sent

script.message: I need to book a bridge appointment

eval.criteria: Agent recognizes 'bridge' as a valid service and proceeds with booking

tests.name: Availability Check — Must Query Before Offering

script.message: Can I book a filling for next Monday?

eval.criteria: Agent calls check_availability before offering any specific times. Agent does NOT invent availability.

tests.name: Rejection — Should NOT Ask for Address

script.message: I want to book a cleaning

eval.criteria: Agent proceeds through booking flow without ever asking for home address, DOB, or insurance card number
